name: schema-generator
description: Infer a unified TypeScript schema from JSONL records.

scripts.smoke:ts: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --type-name SampleRecord --format typescript
scripts.smoke:zod: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --type-name SampleRecord --format zod
scripts.smoke:json-schema: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --type-name SampleRecord --format json-schema
scripts.smoke: pnpm run smoke:ts && pnpm run smoke:zod && pnpm run smoke:json-schema
